description: Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited (BPCL) is an Indian oil and gas company that provides fuels, LPG, lubricants, and related energy products and services. Its public website is primarily corporate and customer-facing rather than a developer platform.
summary: bharatpetroleum.com itself does not expose developer docs or public integration endpoints; the only developer-facing surface found tied to BPCL is a third-party-listed API Setu HTTP API for LPG eSubscription vouchers, with OpenAPI available but authentication not determined from public docs reviewed.

surfaces.name: BPCL LPG eSubscription Voucher API (via API Setu)
